title: Youtube Poop: Albuquirky Part 1
description:
A Youtube Poop of Weird Al's Albuquerque. Hey, I finally found a good name for this. For a while it was just "Albuquerque," but I decided on Albuquirky. Get it? It's a pun.

So, after my Trapped In The Drive-Poo got a lot of views, I decided to make this. Similar in content, though I focused more on style rather than inputs of other YTP material in it (in retrospect, a big mistake. Something I didn't do in Part 2).

Part 2 is up. I almost feel like taking Part 1 down because it falls short of my expectations, but part 2 doesn't. Eh, I'll keep it.

Special thanks to R. Wappin who originally made the Albuquerque animation.
